overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene showing a character in traditional blue robes walking through a misty, atmospheric wetland at dawn. The character traverses wooden plank paths and bridges past traditional East Asian architecture and gnarled trees, with fog diffusing the early morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty wetland boardwalk with traditional architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden plank path through misty wetlands with pagoda visible to the left

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a raised walkway through the marsh
traditional East Asian pagoda with curved roof visible through the mist
leafless gnarled tree with twisted branches silhouetted against fog
hazy mountain silhouettes barely visible through the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a misty dawn wetland where a character in blue robes walks along a wooden plank path. A traditional pagoda stands to the left while a gnarled dead tree rises on the right, with fog-shrouded mountains in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh approaching large landmark tree

events.description: pagoda building passes out of view behind left shoulder as path curves

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wooden path toward a large living tree ahead while the pagoda recedes behind

entered.detail: mature tree with full foliage standing prominently in the mist ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving past the pagoda, the path curves slightly toward a large living tree that dominates the center view. The dead tree shifts to the center as the character progresses deeper into the misty marsh.

events.description: wooden shrine gate with decorative flags becomes visible on left side of path

agents.ego_description: walking past a wooden shrine structure on the left while approaching a bridge crossing

entered.detail: traditional wooden gate structure with hanging flags and lanterns
low wooden railings appearing along the sides of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden shrine gate on the left marked by flags, while the path begins to transition into a bridge with railings. The large tree moves to the right background as the forest wall ahead becomes more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing over marsh water

events.description: path transitions to wooden bridge with railings on both sides crossing the marsh

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge with railings, heading toward a gnarled tree at the forest edge

entered.detail: twisted dead tree with bare branches marking the forest entrance ahead
weathered wooden fence railing running along the left side of the bridge
weathered wooden fence railing running along the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto a narrow wooden bridge with railings on both sides, crossing over the misty marsh water. The shrine and previous trees fall behind as a gnarled dead tree looms ahead at the forest entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty dawn wetland that transitions from an open marshland into a dense forest entrance. It begins with a character in blue robes walking along a wooden plank path, flanked by a traditional pagoda and a gnarled dead tree against a backdrop of fog-shrouded mountains. As the character progresses, the path curves past the pagoda toward a large living tree that dominates the center view before the dead tree shifts into focus. The scene then shifts toward a wooden shrine gate marked by flags as the plank path evolves into a bridge with railings, pushing the large tree into the right background. Finally, the camera follows the character across the narrow bridge over the misty water, leaving the shrine behind as a looming dead tree marks the threshold of the forest ahead.
